label: tract classifier (ngsTracts STEP_TRC_01)
notes: Producer-side ngsTracts; this row registers the adapter that bridges TSV → typed envelope.

label: per-(chrom × dyad) CO/DCO/NCO counts
notes: Derives co_per_mb / dco_per_mb when absent. Karyotype-stratified rows when karyotype_at_focal_inv present.

label: coefficient of coincidence per interval pair
notes: c = r_ab/(r_a·r_b); flags c > neg_interference_threshold (default 3.0). Supports karyo-stratified mode for interchromosomal page.

label: per-tested-chrom local inversion covariates
notes: Filtered subset of inversion_candidates.v1; derives length_bp from end-start+1.

label: per-(focal_inv × parent) null-model assignment
notes: permutation_block = family_id by default; n_singleton_blocks diagnostic for shuffle degeneracy.

label: per-candidate sex-specific CO ideogram + telomere curve
notes: Per-inversion-candidate JSON; consumer also includes genome-atlas page3 CO-density sub-track.

label: per-candidate NCO/GC tract ideogram + telomere curve
notes: Sister track to crossover_track; kind ∈ {nco, gc}.

label: PRDM9 PWM from CO hotspots
notes: Optional. Embedded on same per-candidate crossover JSON.

label: NCO enrichment inside vs outside inversion candidate
notes: CHAIN. Crosstab MOSAIC_SHORT × in/out, Fisher exact; manuscript NCO headline.

label: CO_rate(het) vs CO_rate(non-het) per focal × tested chrom
notes: CHAIN. Cell <0.7 highlight is the manuscript intrachromosomal-effect signal.

label: HEADLINE: focal inversion karyotype → meiosis on OTHER chromosomes
notes: CHAIN. Welch's t on per-parent CO rates (het vs non-het) + family-aware permutation null (shuffle within permutation_block) + BH + Bonferroni across off-focal chrom tests. Currently inlined in interchromosomal/_stats.js — module promotion required before catalogue compute lookup works end-to-end.
